    devfs.rules: Do not expose "log" in the default devfs rules.

    /etc/rc.d/jail no longer creates /dev/log as a symbolic link since
    commit 84b354cb9ab61224713c159b1484e8f070fd37be.

    PR:             228351
    Reviewed by:    jamie, mark
